subcodes.first_line: O friends! The verses have been sent down, the manifest evidences have appeared, and the Book is revealed in such wise as to encompass the realm of hearts and understanding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان ایات نازل بینات ظاهر کتاب مشهود بشانیکه عالم قلوب و ادراکرا احاطه نمود
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
